utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: My best shoes , so good to me .

utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: Down at the heel , holes in the toes .

utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: Do not care what people say .

utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: My feet best friends , pals to the end .

utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: With them I am one hot chicky .

utterances.speaker: Leslie
utterances.text: Though late one night , not much light , I ...

utterances.speaker: Phoebe and Leslie
utterances.text: Sticky shoes , sticky shoes , always make me smile . Sticky shoes , sticky shoes , next time I will ... avoid the ... pillleeeee .
